Tests division of positive infinity by 2 in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test assertion that checks the behavior of dividing `Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY` by 2 in JavaScript. The assertion verifies that the result of this division is still `Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY`, which is consistent with the mathematical properties of infinity. This code provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific aspect of JavaScript's handling of infinite numbers. It is likely used in a test suite to ensure that the JavaScript engine adheres to expected numerical behavior.
